title: G1: Fix a concrete family and a precise limit theorem

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
The statement is open-ended ("identify natural families ... prove or characterize"). A solution must first **commit to a concrete ensemble** and a precise theorem; merely restating the open question fails.

Recommended target: the **Mallows measure** $\mu_{n,q}(\pi)\propto q^{\mathrm{inv}(\pi)}$, $\mathrm{inv}(\pi)=\#\{i<j:\pi(i)>\pi(j)\}$, $Z_{n,q}=[n]_q!=\prod_{i=1}^n\frac{1-q^i}{1-q}$.

Required deliverable: explicit centering $a_n$, scaling $b_n\asymp n^{1/3}$ (up to slowly varying factors), and the claimed limit law, e.g.
$$\frac{L(\pi)-a_n}{b_n}\xrightarrow{d} F_{\mathrm{TW}_2}\quad(\pi\sim\mu_{n,q_n})$$
in a specified regime $q_n=1-\beta n^{-\gamma}$. Without a precise statement, none of G2--G7 can be evaluated.
